## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard GrowthX team to Syft data platform and explore potential use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Syft integrates with LinkedIn, HubSpot, and website data to provide enriched contact/company insights and engagement analytics](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Key features include LinkedIn activity tracking, automated workflows ("motions"), and detailed pipeline reporting](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [GrowthX team plans to experiment with Syft for webinar attendee engagement and LinkedIn post analytics](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)

## Topics

### Syft Platform Overview

  - [Connects data from HubSpot, LinkedIn, website visitors](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Chrome extension pulls LinkedIn data locally for security](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [UI shows enriched contact/company data with engagement context](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Can create custom lists and automated workflows ("motions")](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Pipeline reports provide detailed engagement analytics](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)

### LinkedIn Integration Capabilities

  - [Tracks post engagement (likes, comments) for specified profiles](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
  - [Can automate connection requests and track DM activity](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
  - [Adds tracking parameters to shared GrowthX links](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=2727.0)
  - [Ad campaign data can be pulled in for analysis](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)
  - [Weekly connection request limit of \~150-200 enforced by LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=2037.0)

### HubSpot Integration

  - [Syncs Syft data to HubSpot timeline](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [Can create new contacts/companies in HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [Existing HubSpot lists visible in Syft interface](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Potential Use Cases for GrowthX

  - [Engage webinar attendees via LinkedIn/email follow-ups](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=1919.0)
  - [Analyze LinkedIn post performance and audience](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=1555.0)
  - [Track ad campaign engagement](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
  - [Enrich product analytics data (e.g. PostHog integration)](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=2159.0)

### Data Privacy and Security

  - [Extension runs locally, Syft doesn't store LinkedIn credentials](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=2683.0)
  - [No message content synced, only activity metadata](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=2869.0)
  - [User has control over what profiles/data are tracked](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to experiment with platform and consider initial "motion" to implement](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=2551.0)
  - [Team to allow Syft data collection to populate over next week](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for late Wednesday or following Monday at 4pm](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=2778.0)
  - [Kyle to assist with any HubSpot integration questions](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=2096.0)
  - [Imran to investigate potential Circle (community platform) integration options](https://fathom.video/share/Ur5KhjtMSrxmxcxx--hniV__b6zVy46L?tab=summary&timestamp=2231.0)
